privileged_info_summary: The task CSV file 'vendor_catalog_update.csv' is synthetic data generated during task setup, containing exactly 15 office supply products with three product categories (Writing Instruments, Office Paper, Desk Accessories). All metadata claims in task.json are verified correct: csv_filename is 'vendor_catalog_update.csv', expected product count is 15. All three ground truth samples are verified: PEN-GEL-BLK (price $2.50, cost $0.85, Writing Instruments), PAP-A4-500 (price $6.99, cost $3.50, Office Paper), and DSK-ORG-MESH (price $14.99, cost $6.50, Desk Accessories). The CSV structure correctly maps RRP to sales price and Wholesale Cost to product cost.
